methods.description: Collection of samples from lava flows and pyroclastic sequences during field seasons at Quetrupillán.

steps.description: Observations of deposits were made, samples were collected from lava flows and pyroclastic sequences, and field mapping was supplemented with satellite images.
steps.searchable_summary: collect samples from lava flows and pyroclastic sequences, perform field mapping with satellite images

methods.description: Preparation and analysis of thin sections from Holocene lava samples using petrological and electron microscopes.

steps.description: Polished thin sections of 36 samples of Holocene lavas were cut, and these were analysed under a petrological microscope.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare and analyze thin sections using petrological microscope

steps.description: Twenty-one thin sections were studied using the scanning electron microscope (SEM) and semi-quantitative analyses were performed using the energy dispersive spectrometer (EDS).
steps.searchable_summary: analyze thin sections with SEM and EDS

steps.description: Thirteen thin sections were further analysed with the electron microprobe (EMPA).

methods.description: XRF analysis to determine abundances of major and trace elements in Holocene lavas and pyroclastic deposits.

steps.description: Samples were crushed and then ground to powder using agate grinding jars.
steps.searchable_summary: crush and grind samples to powder

steps.description: Trace element concentrations were measured from pressed powder pellets.
steps.searchable_summary: measure trace elements from powder pellets

steps.description: Major element concentrations were measured from fused glass discs.
steps.searchable_summary: measure major elements from glass discs

steps.description: To create the discs, powders were heated at 1100°C for 20 min and the loss on ignition (LOI) of volatiles was recorded.
steps.searchable_summary: heat powders to create glass discs and record LOI

steps.description: Powders were then mixed with a borate flux and remelted at 1100°C, before casting on a hotplate.
steps.searchable_summary: mix powders with borate flux and remelt
